strengths: Exceeds the minimum experience requirement with over 15 years in software and infrastructure engineering, including building high-scale cloud microservices and Kubernetes deployments.
Demonstrates the preferred AI builder and coding fluency through recent hands-on development of AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.

Possesses strong entrepreneurial and technical leadership experience as a Founder (GISCollective) and frequent workshop organizer, aligning perfectly with the expectation to inspire others and drive disruptive endeavors.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field, holding a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science instead.

While possessing hands-on AI tooling experience, the resume lacks a long-term, recognized track record of driving Director-level AI product strategy or advising enterprise customers on AI differentiation.
The most recent, directly relevant AI experience was relatively brief (7 months), and the candidate is currently in a career gap.
response.justification: Bogdan is a compelling candidate who easily exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement with a robust foundation in scalable cloud infrastructure, microservices, and full-stack software development. His recent hands-on work engineering AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly satisfies the preferred requirement for AI builder fluency and product development. Combined with his proven entrepreneurial drive as an open-source founder and his extensive history of inspiring technical communities through workshops and conference talks, Bogdan demonstrates the technical depth and leadership qualities necessary to drive cutting-edge AI strategy and implementation.
